headline: Carnival and Malibu Boats Stocks Trade Up, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after WTI crude crashed 4.7% to $92.94 on Iran-US peace deal progress, providing direct relief to airlines, hotels, cruise lines, and online travel agents.

headline: Stock Market Today, May 26: Micron Surges After UBS Lifts Price Target on AI Optimism
summary: On May 26, 2026, Micron’s AI-fueled leap helped propel chips and tech higher even as old-line blue chips lost ground.

headline: S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 Climb to Record Highs on Tech Stock Strength
